description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a light gray hip roof and white exterior walls. The property features a driveway leading to a garage on the right side, with a small front porch and steps at the main entrance. The front yard is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn, while a low fence partially encloses the backyard. Windows are symmetrically arranged along the visible facades, and the house includes a chimney and a paved walkway connecting the driveway to the entryway. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of a modern ranch-style home.
description: A single-story, white suburban house with a gray hip roof, garage, landscaped yard, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the driveway, garage, main entry porch, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a portion of the backyard with a large tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, fence, and dense tree coverage behind the house.
description_view_3: Front view with a clear look at the main entryway, porch, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small porch with steps, a single front door, and minimal decorative elements.
